name: True Spec Golf - North Georgia
address: 1310 Joe Frank Harris Pkwy SE, Cartersville, GA 30120
about:
True Spec Golf - North Georgia is a specialized club fitting studio located at Governors Towne Club in Acworth, Georgia. This venue provides a professional, data-driven environment focused on optimizing golf equipment through advanced technology. The facility features a state-of-the-art mobile fitting unit equipped with the Foresight GCQuad, the industry's first quadroscopic launch monitor, ensuring precise analysis of swing and ball flight data.

As part of the True Spec network, the North Georgia location maintains a brand-agnostic philosophy, offering a massive matrix of over 70,000 clubhead and shaft combinations. This allows master fitters to tailor equipment specifically to an individual's swing characteristics without bias toward specific manufacturers. The venue operates by appointment only, creating a private and distraction-free experience for golfers seeking serious improvement.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to Foresight GCQuad quadroscopic launch monitor technology
Brand-agnostic fitting with over 70,000 equipment combinations
Expert master fitters providing data-driven club recommendations
Private, appointment-only setting for personalized attention

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your current clubs for analysis, but True Spec provides a vast inventory of clubheads and shafts for you to test during the fitting session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Most club fitting studios do not allow outside food or drink, but you should contact the venue directly to confirm their specific policy.

faq.question: How long does a fitting take?
faq.answer: A full bag fitting typically takes about 2 to 3 hours to ensure every aspect of your bag is properly optimized.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, junior golfers are welcome, though the environment is focused on professional fitting and instruction.
